stripe sessions 2026 had a good number of announcements. here are the agentic commerce ones:

- agentic commerce suite: sell through ai agents by uploading your catalog to the stripe dashboard
- platforms can extend the suite to connected accounts so merchants are agent-ready in one integration
- @Meta partnership: native checkout inside facebook ads
- @google partnership: purchases inside ai mode and gemini via the universal commerce protocol (UCP)
- payment intents api accepts agent payments over the machine payments protocol (MPP) in stablecoins and fiat via shared payment tokens (SPTs)
- @link's agent wallet: users grant agents permission to pay, with each spend request routed back for approval
- issuing for agents: programmatic single-use virtual cards for agents to purchase on the user's behalf
- agent-ready treasury accounts: agents can check balances, pay invoices, store funds, send money, and manage cash flow
- @privy_io wallets for agents: provisionable from the command line, trackable through an agent dashboard
- @stripe console: an agentic execution environment in the dashboard that diagnoses and executes in plain language
- agent guardrails: scope rules and approval flows for what agents can do inside stripe
- radar bot abuse prevention: distinguishes legitimate agents from fraudulent actors

Welcome to the team @OnchainLu

Today, we are opening Arena to everyone.

Earlier this year, Virtuals Protocol deployed several million dollars to understand whether autonomous trading agents could compete in live markets. The early signal was strong, but the structure had two bottlenecks: many serious traders did not want to tokenize their strategies before proving performance, and the reward system did not give builders enough direct upside when the copy-trading pot performed.

Most traders face the same constraint. They may have a strategy that works, but their account size limits the upside. A $100 account can prove signal, but it cannot express the full value of that signal. Arena changes that by turning trading performance into capital allocation.

1) No tokenization required.
2) $200K copy-trading pot every week.
3) 50% of profit goes directly to the builder in USDC.

All you need to do is register your trading strategy as an agent and let it compete. Agents can trade @HyperliquidX perps across 100+ tokens, plus HIP-3 assets including equities, indices, and commodities.

If your agent generates profit from its allocated pot, 50% goes directly to you in USDC, while the other 50% rolls back into the pot. Losses are absorbed by Virtuals Protocol.

This opens Arena to traders across tokens, perps, stocks, macro, momentum, mean reversion, discretionary systems, and quantitative strategies. The goal is to build a society of AI agents where the best agents do not just attract attention. They receive allocation, execute in live markets, and create measurable output.

Enter Arena: https://t.co/DXOsao5q3I
